summary: Tested Manager Team Engagement Feature - Backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and Frontend UI working correctly

minor.issue: Invalid ObjectId (non-hex string) returns 500 instead of graceful empty result or 400

action_items: MINOR: Add try/except around ObjectId conversion in _get_team_user_ids() to handle invalid IDs gracefully
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints correctly implemented: team-hot-leads aggregates across org users, reassign-lead enforces manager role and ownership_type='org'
Frontend Team Engagement page correctly displays: header, 4 summary cards, period filters (Today/48Hours/7Days), 3 tabs (Alerts/Hot Leads/Team)
Reassign button correctly only shows for can_reassign=true leads (org-owned only)
Auto-refresh every 30 seconds correctly implemented via useEffect interval
Admin panel correctly shows 'Team Engagement' link in Tools section (line 524-530 in admin/index.tsx)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team Engagement feature fully working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_team_engagement.py. Personal contact reassignment correctly blocked (tested with contact 69a1dbb4320d732f90069652). The data-testid attributes in team-engagement.tsx are set but Playwright has trouble finding them in React Native Web - use text-based selectors instead.

backend_api.GET /api/engagement/team-hot-leads/{mana: Returns hot_leads, team_stats, alert_leads with correct structure
backend_api.POST /api/engagement/reassign-lead (pers: Correctly returns 403 with message 'Only organization-created leads can be reassigned'
backend_api.can_reassign field: Correctly returns true for ownership_type='org', false otherwise

frontend_verified.Admin panel navigation: Team Engagement link visible in Tools section for managers
frontend_verified.Summary cards: 4 cards showing Hot Leads, Alerts(3+), Actions, Signals counts
frontend_verified.Period filter: Today, 48 Hours, 7 Days filters working and updating stats
frontend_verified.Tab navigation: Alerts, Hot Leads, Team tabs working with correct content
frontend_verified.Team tab: Shows team member Forest Ward with activity breakdown
frontend_verified.Alerts tab: Shows 'All clear' when no 3+ interaction contacts

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - does not send real SMS
